items.label: Getting Started
items.content:
# Starter Integration

To quickly start using AIClient in your web page, include the library via a `<script>` tag from jsDelivr and initialize it with basic configuration.

### Include AIClient
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/HyperRushNet/hrn-ai/client/1.0.3.min.js"></script>
```

### Initialize AIClient
```javascript
const client = new AIClient()
  .setApiKey('YOUR_API_KEY') // REQUIRED
```

This minimal setup allows you to immediately generate text or image outputs using AIClient.

children.label: API Key
children.content:
# API Key

**Description:** Your personal API key for authentication. Must be set before any request.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setApiKey('YOUR_API_KEY');
```
**Type:** string, **Required:** Yes, **Default:** null

children.label: Model
children.content:
# Model

**Description:** AI model to use for generation. Required for all operations.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setModel('flux');
```
**Type:** string, **Required:** Yes, **Default:** none

children.label: System Prompt
children.content:
# System Prompt

**Description:** Optional instruction to guide text model outputs.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setSystemPrompt('You are a helpful assistant.');
```
**Type:** string, **Applicable Only For:** text

children.label: Timeout
children.content:
# Timeout

**Description:** Maximum time (ms) to wait for a response before aborting.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setTimeout(30000);
```
**Type:** number, **Default:** 30000

children.label: Seed
children.content:
# Seed

**Description:** Numeric seed for reproducible outputs.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setSeed(12345);
```
**Type:** number | null, **Default:** null

children.label: Retry Logic
children.content:
# Retry Logic

**Description:** Automatically retry failed requests.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setRetry(true, 2, 1000);
```
**Parameters:** enabled (boolean), attempts (number), delay (ms), **Default:** enabled=true, attempts=2, delay=1000

children.label: Image Dimensions
children.content:
# Image Dimensions

**Description:** Width & height for image generation. Only applies to type='image'.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.setDimensions(1024, 1024);
```
**Type:** number, **Default:** 1024 x 1024

children.label: Clear History
children.content:
# Clear History

**Description:** Clears stored conversation history. Only applies for text.

**Usage:**
```javascript
client.clearHistory();
```
**Type:** none

children.label: Generate Text
Generate Image
